rulings.Case Title: EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC ET AL VS. SHULGIN AVIATION, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss And Or Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 04, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT SHULGIN AVIATION, LLC Motion To Dismiss And Or Compel Arbitration is DENIED as requested. The gravamen of this case is the distribution of funds under the Operating Agreement by the signatories to the agreement; an issue that is indisputably governed by the arbitration clause. This complaint, naming only the recipient of the funds, and not the transferor-signatory to the Operating Agreement appears to be an attempt to avoid arbitration and to seek the Court's determination on the issue of propriety of the distribution of and/or diversion of funds. Such attempt, while legally creative, undermines the arbitration clause and will not be condoned by the Court. While the Court will not compel arbitration between Plaintiff and Shulgin Aviation, the action will be stayed until such time a determination is made in arbitration regarding allegations in paragraph 24 and 25 of the Complaint as to Plaintiff's entitlement to the funds under the Operating Agreement. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. The moving Points and Authorities are devoid of any authorities on this point and there is no showing of compliance with CCP 128.5 (claimed to be the basis for the request in reply). CCP 128.5 (f)(1)(A)-(B). =(501/REQ)
